/usr/bin/c++ -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/home/batspine/Projects/TZ=. -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,relro -rdynamic CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/socket.cpp.o -o server
